title: Swarm Art in the Browser with boids4R
text: examples mirror boids4R scenario gallery: compact schools, obstacle corridors, predator avoidance, murmurations, mixed-species 3D flocks. widget built renderer-neutral boids_simulation object animated ggWebGL timeline.
code: if (!boids4r_available) {   cat("Scenario gallery widgets skipped.\n") } else {   scenario_gallery <- list(     schooling_2d = boids4R::boids_scenario(       "schooling_2d",       n = 180L,       steps = 80L,       record_every = 2L,       seed = 111L     ),     obstacle_corridor_2d = boids4R::boids_scenario(       "obstacle_corridor_2d",       n = 160L,       steps = 90L,       record_every = 2L,       seed = 112L     ),     predator_avoidance_2d = boids4R::boids_scenario(       "predator_avoidance_2d",       n = 170L,       steps = 90L,       record_every = 2L,       seed = 113L     ),     murmuration_3d = boids4R::boids_scenario(       "murmuration_3d",       n = 240L,       steps = 90L,       record_every = 3L,       seed = 114L     ),     mixed_species_3d = boids4R::boids_scenario(       "mixed_species_3d",       n = 210L,       steps = 90L,       record_every = 3L,       seed = 115L     )   )    scenario_widgets <- lapply(names(scenario_gallery), function(name) {     sim <- scenario_gallery[[name]]     spec <- boids4R::as_ggwebgl_spec(       sim,       vector_every = if (identical(sim$dimension, "3d")) 16L else 12L,       vector_scale = if (identical(sim$dimension, "3d")) 0.11 else 0.13,       shader = "density_splat"     )     spec$labels$title <- paste("boids4R", name)     spec$render$timeline$autoplay <- TRUE     spec$render$timeline$loop <- TRUE     spec$render$timeline$speed <- 1.4     ggWebGL::ggWebGL(spec, height = if (identical(sim$dimension, "3d")) 540 else 500)   })   names(scenario_widgets) <- names(scenario_gallery) }

title: Swarm Art in the Browser with boids4R
text: custom workflow builds corridor low-level boids4R constructors, compares baseline run stronger obstacle/predator avoidance run.
code: if (!boids4r_available) {   cat("Custom workflow widgets skipped.\n") } else {   bounds <- matrix(     c(-2.4, -1.35, 2.4, 1.35),     ncol = 2,     dimnames = list(c("x", "y"), c("min", "max"))   )    n_school <- 96L   n_scout <- 32L   n_boids <- n_school + n_scout   school_axis <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_school)   scout_axis <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_scout)   positions <- rbind(     cbind(-2.18 + 0.83 * school_axis, -0.70 + 0.95 * abs(sin(pi * school_axis))),     cbind(-2.22 + 0.77 * scout_axis, 0.28 + 0.64 * abs(cos(pi * scout_axis)))   )   velocity_phase <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = n_boids)   velocities <- cbind(     0.35 + 0.20 * cos(velocity_phase),     0.08 * sin(velocity_phase)   )    custom_state <- boids4R::boids_state(     n_boids,     "2d",     bounds = bounds,     positions = positions,     velocities = velocities,     species = c(rep("school", n_school), rep("scout", n_scout))   )    custom_world <- boids4R::boids_world(     "2d",     bounds = bounds,     boundary = "reflect",     obstacles = data.frame(       x = c(-0.82, -0.05, 0.72),       y = c(0.42, -0.36, 0.48),       radius = c(0.30, 0.36, 0.31)     ),     predators = data.frame(       x = -0.25,       y = 0.92,       radius = 0.58,       strength = 1.2     ),     attractors = data.frame(       x = 2.08,       y = -0.86,       strength = 0.95     )   )    baseline_params <- boids4R::boids_params(     "2d",     separation_weight = 1.35,     alignment_weight = 0.94,     cohesion_weight = 0.62,     obstacle_weight = 2.5,     predator_weight = 2.3,     goal_weight = 0.16,     max_speed = 1.18,     max_force = 0.12,     noise = 0.001   )    avoidance_params <- boids4R::boids_params(     "2d",     separation_weight = 1.35,     alignment_weight = 0.94,     cohesion_weight = 0.62,     obstacle_weight = 2.8,     predator_weight = 3.2,     goal_weight = 0.20,     max_speed = 1.18,     max_force = 0.12,     noise = 0.001   )    custom_runs <- list(     baseline = boids4R::simulate_boids(       custom_state,       custom_world,       baseline_params,       steps = 95L,       record_every = 2L,       seed = 221L     ),     stronger_avoidance = boids4R::simulate_boids(       custom_state,       custom_world,       avoidance_params,       steps = 95L,       record_every = 2L,       seed = 222L     )   )    custom_widgets <- lapply(names(custom_runs), function(name) {     spec <- boids4R::as_ggwebgl_spec(       custom_runs[[name]],       vector_every = 10L,       vector_scale = 0.14,       shader = "density_splat"     )     spec$labels$title <- paste("boids4R custom corridor:", name)     spec$render$timeline$autoplay <- TRUE     spec$render$timeline$loop <- TRUE     spec$render$timeline$speed <- 1.5     ggWebGL::ggWebGL(spec, height = 500)   })   names(custom_widgets) <- names(custom_runs) }

text: Shiny, browser emits current timeline state input$<outputId>_timeline. Server code can update browser-side timeline updateGgWebGLTimeline(). repository also includes compact optional app inst/examples/shiny/timeline-control-demo.R.
code: library(shiny) library(ggWebGL)  ui <- fluidPage(   actionButton("restart", "Reset"),   ggWebGLOutput("plot", height = "420px"),   verbatimTextOutput("timeline_state") )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   output$plot <- renderGgWebGL({     temporal_helix_widget(height = 460)   })    observeEvent(input$restart, {     updateGgWebGLTimeline(session, "plot", index = 1L, playing = FALSE)   })    output$timeline_state <- renderPrint({     input$plot_timeline   }) }  if (interactive()) {   shinyApp(ui, server) }

title: Add WebGL Rendering Options to a ggplot — theme_webgl
text: shader Shader preset name path identifier. Built-modes include point shaders ("default", "density_splat", "uncertainty_alpha", "point_sprite_glow"), trajectory shaders ("trajectory_age", "trajectory_age_glow", "trajectory_velocity", "trajectory_direction"), raster shaders ("raster_texture", "raster_threshold", "raster_contour_overlay"). Mesh surface layers usually select shader material/shading arguments. antialias Logical scalar; whether antialiasing requested. transparent Logical scalar; whether drawing surface allow transparency. buffer_size Integer scalar giving initial buffer allocation used eventual renderer. interactions Legacy character vector interaction modes enable. New code use selection = ggwebgl_selection(...) brush/lasso behavior. interactions_spec Optional ggwebgl_interactions() object. preferred structured interaction contract hover, click, brush, lasso, camera, Shiny event behavior. rendering Rendering contract mode. "visualization" keeps current interactive widget chrome. "publication" suppresses presentation chrome default intended clean figure capture. panel_overlay Panel overlay display mode. "auto" shows panel strips frames faceted plots, "show" forces , "hide" removes . view Optional ggwebgl_view() object. preferred structured view/camera contract. selection Optional ggwebgl_selection() object. preferred selection contract. dimension, camera, projection, camera_state Legacy view fields retained internal migration shim. depth_test Logical scalar. NULL uses renderer default: disabled 2D scenes enabled 3D scenes. Set explicitly override. blend_mode Primitive blending mode: "auto", "alpha", "additive", "premultiplied". timeline Optional ggwebgl_timeline() specification runtime playback controls. ... Reserved future backend-specific options.

title: Build ggWebGL Renderer Options — webgl_spec
code: webgl_spec(   camera = c("panzoom", "orbit", "trackball"),   projection = c("orthographic", "perspective"),   dimension = NULL,   depth_test = NULL,   blend_mode = c("auto", "alpha", "additive", "premultiplied"),   shader = NULL,   interactions = NULL,   view = NULL,   selection = NULL,   timeline = NULL,   ... )

title: Build ggWebGL Renderer Options — webgl_spec
text: camera Camera/controller mode. "panzoom" targets 2D scenes; "orbit" "trackball" target 3D scenes. projection Projection mode, "orthographic" "perspective". dimension Optional renderer dimensionality. omitted, "orbit" "trackball" imply "3d" "panzoom" implies "2d". depth_test Logical scalar. NULL enables depth testing 3D scenes disables 2D scenes. blend_mode Primitive blending mode: "auto", "alpha", "additive", "premultiplied". shader Optional shader preset. interactions Optional interaction mode vector. view Optional ggwebgl_view() object. supplied, takes precedence camera, projection, dimension. selection Optional ggwebgl_selection() object. timeline Optional ggwebgl_timeline() object. ... Additional renderer options stored webgl$extra.

title: ggWebGL 0.7.0
text: Added ggwebgl_interactions() structured interaction contract hover, click, brush/lasso, camera, Shiny event behavior. Added renderer-owned hover/click picking coverage additional primitive types, including vectors, raster cells, structured surfaces. Unified Shiny interaction event emission hover, selection, brush, camera, timeline/time state preserving existing timeline update APIs. Added CRAN-safe Shiny interaction demo exercises hover, click, brush, camera, time events without custom JavaScript.

title: ggWebGL 0.6.0
text: Added XGeoRTR boids4R Suggests optional integrations keeping hard dependencies. Restored richer boids4R animation swarm-art vignette plus matching htmlwidget example, using installed suggested packages instead sibling-repository loading. Restored live XGeoRTR bridge vignette behavior neutral renderer/backend ownership wording guarded example code. Kept shapViz3D guarded optional ecosystem example without adding package dependencies. Updated dependency bridge tests allow XGeoRTR boids4R Suggests continuing reject hard dependencies optional ecosystem packages.

title: ggWebGL 0.5.0
text: Froze experimental renderer API around structured ggwebgl_view(), ggwebgl_selection(), ggwebgl_material() contracts. Extended vector layers support 3D z/zend coordinates preserving renderer-owned ids, frame/time metadata, browser selection behavior. Added distinct orbit trackball camera control paths normalized rotation-based camera state. Upgraded mesh surface payloads generated normals, Lambert material metadata, picking ids, wireframe/culling controls, GPU payload caching hooks. Expanded interaction-frame benchmark artifact schema fixed frame-rate performance statements require device, browser, GPU, commit, primitive-count, artifact metadata.

title: ggWebGL 0.3.0
text: Added exported ggwebgl_magnify_region() R/magnify-region.R, panel inset modes driven exact data-coordinate rectangle. Added experimental vector-arrow rendering geom_vector_webgl() ggwebgl_layer_vectors(), using renderer-ready shafts triangle arrowheads without backend-specific semantics. Added experimental brush lasso interaction modes emit selected primitive ids Shiny inputs optional JavaScript callbacks. Added experimental timeline controls frame/time filtering primitive layers plus play, scrub, speed, reset UI controls. Added experimental opt-3D camera state, 3D point/line support, indexed mesh payloads, geom_mesh_webgl(), geom_surface_webgl(), ggwebgl_layer_mesh(), ggwebgl_layer_surface(). Added renderer-generic future-work gallery contract tests covering new vector, selection, timeline, camera, mesh, surface paths. Added interaction-frame benchmark schema frame-rate statements. Fixed performance numbers remain future-facing generated benchmark artifacts exist named target machine.

title: ggWebGL 0.2.0
text: Promoted package long-running development scaffold 0.2.0 release line. Added large-scene demo support: persistent point buffers stable large point-cloud interaction, deterministic count-aware density splats, generic hover labels point primitives, reproducible renderer gallery. Added generic downstream adapter helpers renderer-ready point, line, raster primitive specs, including exported ggwebgl_layer_*() constructors ggwebgl_spec(). Added package-owned static export surfaces snapshot_ggwebgl() compose_ggwebgl_figure(), publication-style PNG/JPEG captures simple figure composition can driven package API instead ad hoc scripts. Added project evidence documentation machine-readable evidence summaries internal release validation. Added vignette-local figure copies website articles need images without referencing files outside pkgdown’s allowed article asset paths. Tightened browser-backed static export path around dedicated chromote browser ownership, lighter examples, explicit optional dependency declarations export vignette tooling. Fixed pkgdown/htmlwidget layout containment restoring widget CSS dependency adding inline canvas-stage safeguards, preventing WebGL canvases stacking top article pages.

title: ggWebGL 0.1.0
text: Expanded core renderer beyond initial scaffold reusable showcase helpers, manual htmlwidget Shiny smoke tests, stronger pkgdown-facing documentation surface. Implemented stabilized main point shader modes: default, density_splat, trajectory_age, trajectory_age_glow. Added hover-based sample inspection top existing pan zoom interactions. Added texture-backed raster rendering geom_raster_webgl(). Added fixed-scale facet_wrap() facet_grid() support panel-aware render specification panel-local interaction state. Added packaged real-data evidence examples covering raster fields, storm trajectories, dense embeddings. Added reproducible evaluation suite ggplot2 plotly, including machine-readable metrics benchmark figure scripts inst/benchmarks/. Froze XGeoRTR/ggWebGL renderer boundary RENDERER_CONTRACT.md added first as_ggwebgl_spec.xgeo_state() adapter plus renderer contract tests.

Rewrote package README, citation, pkgdown configuration around intended ggplot2 plus WebGL rendering workflow companion-package split. Removed imported carryover benchmark content copied package tree. Added first real ggplot_webgl() renderer path point line layers, backed minimal WebGL htmlwidget. Added initial showcase vignette gallery, including dense latent-space, diffusion-trajectory, phase-portrait, optimization-path examples. Added reusable standard high_detail showcase presets gallery demo surfaces.
